{{Quote|It is best not to disturb the still water before the storm.|Kalbrac|<ref name="DU" />}}
'''Kalbrac''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] councilor in the [[Mon Calamari Council]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}
